description: Stopped playable cleaner is used on play one shots in order to delete or clean them once they have finished playing.

fields.Playable: the audio player that is playing audio
fields.GracePeriod: How long to wait before deleting the component after it has finished playing.
fields.CheckingUser: The user that is monitoring the ``Playable`` on their machine to check when it has stopped playing

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: This component can stop working if the user is AFK or the slot is disabled, and can cause issues in items like boopers and overload the sound buffer.
